creator: gordon@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to igor.polovykh from comment #6)

Sounds like the tree did not patch correctly.

contrib/unbound/config.h was moved to usr.sbin/unbound/config.h with this update. That said, it is odd that the compilation could not find it. I recommend checking out a fresh releng/12.1 tree and comparing that to your working state. If you can send along reproduction steps showing the error you are citing, I'll be happy to take a look at it.
